name: Heavy Salvo

abilities.name: Combat Distinction
abilities.text: After this model kills an enemy model, replace this crew card with Boosted Heavy Salvo.

abilities.name: Supply Crate
abilities.text: When this model ends its activation, if it is within 2" of a friendly Assault marker, it may remove the marker to heal 1.

actions.name: Bombardment
actions.effects: Make an Assault marker within range. Enemy models within (marker)2" of the made marker must pass a TN 12 Sp or be dealt 2 damage.

extraction_notes: Faction is not visible on this card
Bombardment action uses (arrow)(diamond) icon which represents standard action costs
Assault marker referenced but not defined on this card (likely defined elsewhere)
Reference to 'Boosted Heavy Salvo' crew card variant
